memory:memory/2026-03-10.md:1:9.snippet: - Added policy in AGENTS.md: after any user-visible tool/action error, next reply must state what failed, whether fixed, and exact fix/next step. - Added update-check workflow script at `/home/keiran/.openclaw/check-openclaw-update.sh` and scheduled host cron at `40 6 * * *` (daily, 10 minutes after 6:30 brief) to notify Keiran on Telegram when a newer OpenClaw version is available with release-note links. - Clarified dual cron layers for operations: OpenClaw cron (morning run + morning brief) vs host crontab (oauth/update helper scripts). - Hardened `Weekday Cronulla Running Conditions` prompt with deterministic thresholds and added `📌 CONFIDENCE` line to reduce 5-minute swing inconsistenc
